description_long: This is a futuristic, cross-shaped airplane with four broad, angular wings extending symmetrically from a central fuselage. The body is predominantly teal with white striping and checkerboard patterns, and the identifier 'SÄK8' is prominently displayed on the sides. The wings are thick and taper outward, each featuring colored tips—red, green, and possibly others—suggesting navigation or safety lights. The central section is slightly domed, with a cockpit area that appears to be forward-facing and integrated into the main body, featuring a wraparound window. Small antennae or sensors protrude from the top of the fuselage and wings, adding to its advanced appearance. The underside and landing gear are not visible, but the design suggests a vehicle intended for vertical takeoff and landing in urban environments.
description: A futuristic, teal cross-shaped airplane with four thick, angular wings, white striping, and a forward cockpit. Features colored wingtip lights and checkerboard markings.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from above and slightly behind, showing the teal body, white stripes, and the 'SÄK8' marking on the left wing, with colored tips visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the airplane, revealing the cockpit's wraparound window and the symmetrical extension of all four wings.
description_view_2: A rear-side angle, similar to view 0, but with more emphasis on the right wing and the colored tips, as well as the central dome.
description_view_3: A direct rear view, showing the back of the fuselage and the even spread of the four wings, with less detail on the cockpit.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, cross-shaped configuration with straight, thick wings and colored navigation lights at the tips; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; engine type not apparent from images.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail; features a tailless, integrated design with no vertical or horizontal stabilizers visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the central fuselage with a wraparound window.
